tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: Most parameters are within normal limits. Notable findings include mildly elevated chloride, low total CO₂ (suggesting possible mild metabolic acidosis), and elevated total cholesterol and LDL cholesterol, indicating increased cardiovascular risk. Renal function and glycemic control are normal. Recommend clinical correlation for acid-base status and consideration of lipid-lowering therapy.

display.value: Neuropathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
